name: codehelper-workspace
description: Root build orchestrator for the codehelper Go CLI + MCP. Works on Linux, macOS, and Windows. VS Code extension lives on the vscode-extension branch.

scripts.build:go: npm run build:cli && npm run build:mcp
scripts.install:go: npm run install:cli && npm run install:mcp
scripts.update:cli: npm run build:cli && npm run install:cli
scripts.update:mcp: npm run build:mcp && npm run install:mcp
scripts.update:go: npm run build:go && npm run install:go
